subcodes.first_line: O divine herald! Though brief in words, thy letter was detailed in meaning; though concise in expression, it was replete with significance, for it bore testimony to thy attraction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بشیرالهی نامه مختصر شما مفصل بود لفظ موجز بود ولی معانی مفصل زیرا دلیل بر انجذاب
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness
